title: Rate Limits
summary: Guide to handling request quotas with retries, backoff, and usage-aware client design.
raw:
Rate Limits

Rate limits cap how many requests or tokens an organization can send over a time window, so clients need resilient retry behavior.

Use exponential backoff, jitter, and request smoothing when the API responds with rate limit errors or temporary capacity pressure.

Client strategy

Track request volume, respect quotas, and queue non-urgent work so interactive traffic stays healthy under load.

retry(wait=wait_exponential_jitter(initial=1, max=20))

Good quota handling prevents avoidable failures and makes production systems more stable.
